nodes.name: Daily 8PM Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires 20:00 daily. Workflow-level Settings > Timezone is set to Asia/Karachi.

nodes.name: Combine Reference Data
nodes.notes: 5 inputs merged by position, each contributing exactly 1 item.

nodes.name: Filter Active Trucks + To Items
nodes.notes: PATCHED: reads Config!Reconciliation_Date_Override and substitutes it for real "yesterday" when present. This is where the override actually needs to apply, since Config and the date window both arrive together here.

nodes.name: Traccar GET Trips
nodes.notes: Bearer token auth against self-hosted Traccar. Token via POST /api/session/token, never hardcode the password.

nodes.name: Match Trip to Form Response
nodes.notes: PATCHED: toDateStr() helper replaces the fragile slice(0,10) string comparison so this survives whatever date format Sheets hands back.

nodes.name: Append Trip_Data Row
nodes.notes: Now also writes the new AE column High_Variance_Unmatched_Alert.

value.Raw_Error: ={{ $json.reason === 'NO_TRACCAR_TRIP' ? ('No Traccar trip legs >1000m found for ' + $json.truck.Traccar_Device_Name + ' on ' + $json.dateStr) : ('No Form_Responses row found for Traccar_Device_Name=' + $json.truck.Traccar_Device_Name + ' on ' + $json.dateStr) }}

nodes.name: Read Trip_Data For Count
nodes.notes: PATCHED: alwaysOutputData=true. Without this, n8n halts the whole workflow when Trip_Data is empty (0 rows), silently killing every node downstream (DLQ count, Workflow_Run_Log). This was the actual crash confirmed in the Aug/July test run.

nodes.name: Read DLQ_Log For Count
nodes.notes: PATCHED: alwaysOutputData=true, same reason as Read Trip_Data For Count.

nodes.name: Count Results
nodes.notes: PATCHED (2nd time): 'items' was silently referring to Read DLQ_Log For Count's output, not Trip_Data's. Now both Trip_Data and Form_Responses lookups are pulled explicitly by node name, and both use the shared toDateStr() parser instead of naive slicing.

nodes.name: Prepare Raw Trip Rows
nodes.notes: Audit-log branch, parallel to the main matching flow. Splits Traccar's raw trip array into one row per trip for Traccar_Trips_Raw. If Traccar returned zero trips, this returns no items and the Append node below simply does nothing that run -- no error.

nodes.name: Append Traccar_Trips_Raw
nodes.notes: Writes one row per raw Traccar trip, unmodified, before any matching/variance math runs. Pure audit trail -- credential must be reselected on import like every other Google Sheets node in this workflow.
